Neuropsychiatry-Focused Alto Neuroscience's Mid-Stage Depression Trial Disappoints, Analyst Notes Failure Raises Concerns About Platform
data.description: Alto Neuroscience's ALTO-100 Phase 2b study for major depressive disorder failed to meet its primary endpoint, but the company plans further data analysis and studies.

data.title: Starbucks Analysts Bullish On CEO Brian Niccol After Tough Preannouncement: 'Zeroing In' On Right Issues
data.description: Analysts are weighing in after Starbucks reported worse-than-expected preliminary fourth-quarter results and suspended its guidance for 2025.

data.title: Tesla Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
Amazon Attacks Temu and Shein's Turf with New Low-Cost Storefront: Report
data.description: Amazon competes with PDD's Temu and Shein by setting price limits for merchants on its low-cost storefront, with plans to ship from China.
